info.title: Zadana API - APIDog Detailed Folders
info.description: OpenAPI document with detailed folder-style tags for APIDog import.

post.summary: Manually assign an approved driver to an order
post.description: Admin manual override for delivery assignment. The selected driver must already be reviewed and approved by admin, and the driver account must be Active. Pending, under-review, rejected, suspended, or inactive drivers are rejected with `DRIVER_NOT_READY_FOR_DISPATCH`.

409.description: Driver is not reviewed and approved yet, or another business rule failed.

example.title: Business rule violation
example.detail: Driver must be reviewed and approved by admin before assignment.

post.summary: Upload a file and receive a public URL
post.description: Mobile should upload the raw image or document here first using multipart/form-data. The returned `url` must then be sent in later JSON requests such as `/api/drivers/register` document fields and `/api/drivers/assignments/{assignmentId}/proof` `imageUrl`.

requestBody.description: Step 1 of the mobile image flow: upload the binary file first, then use the returned URL in the actual driver operation request.

200.description: File uploaded successfully. Save the returned URL and use it in the next JSON request.

items.titleEn: Your order is out for delivery
items.bodyAr: شارك رمز التسليم مع المندوب عند الوصول.
items.bodyEn: Share the delivery OTP with the driver on arrival.

post.summary: Reset and reseed the development database
post.description: Deletes development data and rebuilds a complete deterministic seed dataset. Available only in Development.

Authenticates a driver using email or phone plus password and returns JWT access/refresh tokens with the current user profile snapshot. Mobile should route from `driverStatus.gateStatus` instead of assuming every successful login may enter the home screen.

driverStatus.message: Driver profile is currently under admin review.

post.description: Sends a password reset OTP through the configured channel for the provided email or phone identifier.
Consumes the OTP code and sets a new password for the driver account.
Rotates the refresh token and returns a new access token plus a new refresh token.
Revokes the supplied refresh token and ends the current mobile session.

get.description: Returns the authenticated driver's shared profile snapshot. Use `/api/drivers/me/status` for dispatch readiness and approval state.

put.description: Updates the shared identity profile fields for the authenticated driver account.

post.description: This endpoint expects document image fields as URL strings, not binary files. Mobile should first load active zones from `/api/public/delivery-zones`, let the driver choose one, then load regions from `/api/geography/regions` and cities from `/api/geography/regions/{code}/cities` to select a region and city. Upload each image through `/api/files/upload`, then send the returned URLs here together with `primaryZoneId`, `region`, and `city`. The response includes `driverStatus`, which should immediately decide whether the app opens the home screen or an under-review / rejected / suspended screen.

requestBody.description: Driver registration payload. `primaryZoneId` must be an active delivery zone id returned earlier from `/api/public/delivery-zones`. For `nationalIdImageUrl`, `licenseImageUrl`, `vehicleImageUrl`, and `personalPhotoUrl`, send the URL returned earlier from `/api/files/upload`.

driverStatus.message: Driver profile is currently under admin review.

post.summary: Mark assigned order as picked up
post.description: Driver-only status transition. The authenticated driver must be the assigned driver and must be reviewed and approved by admin before this action succeeds.

409.description: Driver is not approved, not assigned, or the status transition is invalid.

example.title: Business rule violation
example.detail: Driver must be reviewed and approved by admin before handling delivery orders.

post.summary: Mark assigned order as on the way
post.description: Driver-only status transition. The authenticated driver must be the assigned driver and must be reviewed and approved by admin before this action succeeds.

409.description: Driver is not approved, not assigned, or the status transition is invalid.

example.title: Business rule violation
example.detail: Driver must be reviewed and approved by admin before handling delivery orders.

post.description: Driver-only status transition. The authenticated driver must be the assigned approved driver. A photo proof must already be submitted before marking the order as delivered.

409.description: Driver is not approved, proof is missing, driver is not assigned, or the status transition is invalid.

value.title: Business rule violation
value.detail: Driver must be reviewed and approved by admin before handling delivery orders.

value.title: Business rule violation
value.detail: Photo proof is required before marking an order as delivered.

post.summary: Mark assigned order delivery as failed
post.description: Driver-only status transition. The authenticated driver must be the assigned approved driver. A failure note is required.

409.description: Driver is not approved, failure note is missing, driver is not assigned, or the status transition is invalid.

value.title: Business rule violation
value.detail: Driver must be reviewed and approved by admin before handling delivery orders.

value.title: Business rule violation
value.detail: A failure note is required before marking delivery as failed.

post.summary: Run seed data on the current environment
post.description: Runs the application seed logic on the current environment. Requires X-Seeding-Key.

post.summary: Reset and reseed data on the current environment
post.description: Resets and reseeds the database on the current environment. Requires X-Seeding-Key.

schema.description: Filter by driver vehicle type enum.

get.description: Returns the active delivery zones for driver onboarding before the user has a token.
Returns the currently active delivery zones for an authenticated driver who wants to change the current zone later from inside the app.
Canonical mobile endpoint to know whether the authenticated driver is approved, under review, rejected, suspended, or operationally ready for dispatch.

example.message: Driver profile is currently under admin review.

get.description: Returns the complete driver home payload used by the mobile home screen. The backend processes expired offers before building the response, so `currentOffer` can disappear when the offer has already expired server-side.

operationalStatus.message: Driver is approved and can receive orders.

put.description: Assigns one active delivery zone as the driver's current primary operating zone.

Driver can switch availability on only after admin review is approved and the account is Active. Pending, under-review, rejected, suspended, or inactive drivers receive `DRIVER_NOT_READY_FOR_DISPATCH` when trying to go online.

409.description: Driver is not reviewed and approved yet.

example.title: Business rule violation
example.detail: Only approved active drivers can enable availability.

post.description: Sends the latest driver coordinates for live tracking and dispatch ranking. The server records the official timestamp. GPS remains fresh for dispatch ranking for 5 minutes, and readings with accuracyMeters greater than 100 are treated as low-confidence with lower priority rather than hard rejection.

get.description: Returns the current non-terminal assignment only when the authenticated driver has been reviewed and approved by admin and is Active. Pending, under-review, rejected, suspended, or inactive drivers receive `hasAssignment: false` and no order details.

value.message: Driver profile is currently under admin review.

post.description: Accepts the current incoming offer shown on the home screen. Mobile must pass the `assignmentId` coming from `currentOffer.assignmentId`.

409.description: Driver is not approved or the offer can no longer be accepted.

post.description: Rejects the current incoming offer shown on the home screen. Mobile must pass the `assignmentId` coming from `currentOffer.assignmentId`. The `reason` field is optional in the current backend.

409.description: Driver is not approved or the offer can no longer be rejected.

post.description: For photo proof, mobile must upload the image first via `/api/files/upload`, then send the returned URL in `imageUrl`. This endpoint stores the URL in the database as proof metadata. The authenticated driver must be reviewed and approved by admin before proof submission is allowed.

requestBody.description: Proof submission payload. When `proofType` is `image` or `photo`, send `imageUrl` from the earlier `/api/files/upload` response instead of binary image data.

409.description: Driver is not approved, assignment is not owned, or proof cannot be submitted in the current assignment state.

value.title: Business rule violation
value.detail: Driver must be reviewed and approved by admin before submitting delivery proof.

notOwned.summary: Assignment does not belong to driver

value.title: Business rule violation
value.detail: You can only submit proof for your assigned deliveries.

get.description: Returns recent assignments only for approved active drivers. If the driver is still pending review, under review, rejected, suspended, or inactive, the response is an empty list.

Returns a full assignment-first operational snapshot for the authenticated driver. Mobile should use `assignmentStatus`, `driverArrivalState`, and `allowedActions` as the source of truth for the order details screen.
Returns order-level completed history for the authenticated driver. The optional `status` filter supports `delivered`, `cancelled`, and `deliveryFailed`.
Returns the final operational snapshot for one completed, cancelled, or delivery-failed order that belongs to the authenticated driver.
Returns the full profile snapshot for the authenticated driver, including readiness, completion percentage, missing requirements, review state, selected zone, and uploaded document URLs.

put.description: Updates identity-linked personal profile data. Personal changes keep the current review state when the profile remains complete.
Updates vehicle and zone information. Sensitive changes after approval move the driver back to `UnderReview` with a re-review note.
Updates stored driver document image URLs. Mobile should upload files first through `/api/files/upload`, then send the returned URLs here.

get.description: Returns wallet balances, earnings aggregates, recent transactions, payout methods, and withdrawal summary for the authenticated driver.

post.description: Creates a withdrawal request against the driver's current wallet balance and the provided payout method, or the primary method when omitted.

get.description: Returns paginated driver inbox notifications. Query parameter names follow the backend contract exactly: `per_page`, `is_read`, `from_utc`, and `to_utc`.

items.bodyEn: Order ORD-10245 is ready for pickup.

get.description: Returns the unread notifications badge count used by the home header.

post.summary: Mark all driver notifications as read

get.description: Public lookup endpoint used by vendor onboarding and branch screens. Returns all Saudi regions with bilingual names and map coordinates.

get.summary: List cities for a Saudi region
get.description: Public lookup endpoint used after selecting a region. Returns cities for the provided Saudi region code with bilingual names and map coordinates.

dispatchReason.description: Dispatch outcome such as same-zone-live-gps, same-zone-stale-gps, same-city-fallback, out-of-zone-low-priority, or no-eligible-driver.

candidateScoreBreakdown.description: Operational scoring details for admin review, including zone match, GPS freshness, distance bucket, confidence, active orders, and reliability.

dispatchReason.description: Dispatch outcome such as same-zone-live-gps, same-zone-stale-gps, same-city-fallback, out-of-zone-low-priority, or no-eligible-driver.

favoritesCount.description: Legacy shared field from the common auth DTO. Driver mobile clients can ignore it.

isVerified.description: For driver auth responses, this remains false until the driver is operationally approved by admin.

address_id.description: Optional. When omitted, the customer's default address is used.

url.description: Public or CDN URL of the uploaded file. Mobile should reuse this URL in later driver JSON requests.

vehicleType.description: Driver vehicle type enum. Allowed values: Car, Motorcycle, Scooter, Van, Bicycle, Truck. Send enum values, not localized labels.

primaryZoneId.description: Required active delivery zone id selected earlier from `/api/public/delivery-zones`.

nationalIdImageUrl.description: URL returned earlier from `/api/files/upload` for the driver's national ID image.

licenseImageUrl.description: URL returned earlier from `/api/files/upload` for the driver's license image.

vehicleImageUrl.description: URL returned earlier from `/api/files/upload` for the driver's vehicle image.

personalPhotoUrl.description: URL returned earlier from `/api/files/upload` for the driver's personal photo.

imageUrl.description: When using photo proof, send the URL returned earlier from `/api/files/upload`.

BusinessRuleErrorResponse.description: ProblemDetails-style response returned by the global exception middleware for business rule violations.

gateStatus.description: Normalized app-routing state. Expected values include `Operational`, `UnderReview`, `NeedsDocuments`, `Rejected`, `Suspended`, `Inactive`, `PendingActivation`, and `Banned`.

overview.description: Backend-first data for the admin driver overview tab. Unknown metrics are returned as null or empty values, not mocked by the frontend.

workflow.description: Operational workflow state, blockers, alerts, allowed admin actions, and lifecycle stages.

operations.description: Live operations snapshot including location, availability, zone counters, and recent task assignments.

performanceDetails.description: Performance metrics and insights derived from real assignments, offers, incidents, and wallet state only.

support.description: Support notes, incidents, and backend-derived follow-up items. Chat/ticket mocks are not returned.

compliance.description: Compliance counters and document/risk health derived from real backend state.

financeDetails.description: Wallet, ledger, settlement, and payout detail section for the finance tab.

verification.description: Review progress, checklist, recommendation, notes, and rejection reasons used by the verification tab.

gateStatus.description: Normalized app-routing state when the driver is blocked from receiving assignments.

isOperational.description: False when the driver is not yet reviewed and approved by admin.

verificationStatus.description: Current driver verification state when not operational.

accountStatus.description: Current driver account state when not operational.

message.description: Human-readable reason when no assignment is returned because the driver is not operational.

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"

tags.name: System/Geography
tags.description: APIDog folder for System/Geography public lookup endpoints
